title: Swartvlei Guest Farm offers genuine country charm
description: BUSINESS NEWS - Swartvlei Guest Farm in...
bodyText:
Sponsored Content

BUSINESS NEWS - Swartvlei Guest Farm in Sedgefield is a family-friendly gem that offers farm fun and an action-packed getaway!


> Set along Swartvlei Lake, this working farm combines forest, wetland and water to offer genuine country charm.


Accommodation ranges from a beautifully preserved historic manor house to several stone cottages - sleeping between 2 and 12 guests, children included - and some feature woodfired hot tubs.

Whether you’re looking for rest or adventure, there’s something for everyone.

Starting from just R1 250 per night, you can enjoy the sparkling pool, clubhouse and tennis court, while walking trails with mountain rockpools and birdwatching reveal the rich wildlife and Ramsar-designated wetland.

Direct lake access and inland dams open up opportunities for kayaking, fishing or private boat cruises.

Evenings are best spent gathered at the boma, swapping stories under the stars by a crackling fire.

Swartvlei Guest Farm also shines as a boutique venue for weddings and private functions, offering your wedding guests the added joy of exploring the farm’s many activities and experiences.

Venturing further, pristine beaches, vibrant markets and nature reserves just a short drive away offer a taste of the wider Garden Route’s beauty and culture.

At Swartvlei Guest Farm, every precious moment reminds you that the best getaways reconnect you with nature, with others, and with yourself.

If you cherish local gems that deliver unforgettable experiences in a breathtaking setting, we’d be honoured by your vote as the region’s Best Weekend Escape.


> Vote here: https://www.bestofsouthafrica.co.za/george/best-of-george-vote/


‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’
